notes: Salesforce 'New Opportunity' notification bot — announces a newly created opportunity in a deal or account channel. Use this named bot when the workspace roster has a dedicated 'New Opportunity' bot. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. Typically the first card in a deal-pursuit conversation, in an early stage (Qualification / Prospecting).

examples.name: new_opportunity
examples.when: A new opportunity is created and enters an early pipeline stage — opening card of a deal channel.
